text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 
73 
MDCR_CREC 
LABEL: 
Medicare — Current Reason for Entitlement Code (CREC) 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the current reason for Medicare entitlement 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
Medicare MBSF 
VALUES: 
0 = Old age and survivor’s insurance (OASI) 
1 = Disability insurance benefits (DIB) 
2 = End-stage renal disease (ESRD) 
3 = Both DIB and ESRD 
Null/missing = not Medicare enrolled 
COMMENT: 
CCW obtains this
